title: Nursery Rhyme. CCCCXXXI. Jingles.
content:
Ding, dong, darrow,
        The cat and the sparrow;
        The little dog has burnt his tail,
        And he shall be hang'd to-morrow.
meaning:
Unknown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Nursery Rhyme. CCCCXXXI. Jingles."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
